title: Add FTS search indexing test utility
description: Create a test utility at src/utils/test-fts.ts that verifies the retrospective stage creates graph episodes after pipeline completion which are then indexed into the session FTS layer. The test should run a simple task and verify: (1) new retrospective episodes appear in .kody/graph/episodes/, (2) FTS search returns ranked results, (3) searching for 'retrospective' returns results. Currently no retrospective episodes exist in the episodes directory - the test verifies expected behavior that retrospective episodes SHOULD be created after ship stage completes.
existing_patterns: .kody/graph/sessions-index.json - FTS index structure with vocabulary and documents indexed by episodeId
.kody/graph/episodes/ep_plan_001.json - Episode file format with id, runId, source, taskId, createdAt, rawContent, extractedNodeIds, linkedFiles fields
.kody/graph/episodes/.seq - Sequence tracking per source type (migration, plan, nudge, review)
src/utils/*.test.ts - Test file pattern in src/utils/ following describe/it conventions
